description: Parts Inventory management — prevents counterfeit parts sourcing, enforces hazmat shipping compliance, ensures warranty parts are OEM, and monitors fill rates, obsolescence, and core returns

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any parts inventory operation
AI-generated inventory recommendations are decision-support tools — procurement decisions require human authorization
inventory counts and pricing data must reconcile — no phantom stock or mismatched cost records
NEVER source parts from unapproved or suspected counterfeit suppliers — liability and safety risk
hazardous materials (batteries, refrigerants, airbags) must be shipped per DOT/EPA regulations — noncompliance carries federal penalties
warranty repairs must use OEM parts unless the manufacturer explicitly allows alternatives — non-OEM parts void warranty coverage
recalled parts must be quarantined and returned per manufacturer instructions — cannot be installed or sold
unreturned cores past the manufacturer deadline result in forfeited core charges — significant financial loss

soft_flags.logic: parts fill rate (first-time availability) is below the 85% target — causing technician downtime
obsolete parts inventory exceeds 10% of total parts value — write-down exposure
parts department gross profit margin is declining over trailing 30 days
core returns are approaching the manufacturer deadline — risk of forfeiting core credits
emergency or expedited parts orders exceed the configured threshold — indicates stocking level or forecasting issues
